title: woodsia angolensis
intro: Woodsia angolensis, also known as Angolan Woodsia, is a species of fern in the family Woodsiaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Its health benefits include treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, Woodsia angolensis is typically used in the form of infusions or decoctions, and is often combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal properties.
